action: Some swarm/swarmrunner tests resolve EVOLVE_WORKTREE_BASE (or its default) relative to the test cwd, so running them outside a guarded env materialized full nested repo copies inside the package dir: 74MB of residue at go/internal/phases/swarmrunner/.evolve/worktrees/{cycle-1-integration,cycle-1-w1} (gitignore-invisible because .evolve/ matches at any depth; removed 2026-06-11). Audit every test that touches worktreeBase/provisioner paths: each must pin EVOLVE_WORKTREE_BASE to t.TempDir() (t.Setenv) or inject the base explicitly. Add a guard: worktreeBase() could refuse a relative result, or a test-helper asserts no .evolve/ dir exists under the package after the suite.
